microsoft-learn.name: Microsoft Learn
microsoft-learn.description: Official Microsoft Learn MCP server — access to .NET, Azure, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, EF Core, and Microsoft 365 documentation

capabilities.search: Search Microsoft Learn articles and documentation
capabilities.tutorials: Find learning paths and code samples
capabilities.api_references: Look up .NET API and Azure SDK references

when_to_use: Looking up correct .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core / Blazor Server API or pattern
Checking EF Core 10 migration or fluent API syntax
Researching Microsoft.Identity.Web / Entra ID configuration options
Finding official Azure SDK for .NET examples
Verifying MudBlazor or Radzen Blazor component guidance
Checking Azure App Service, Azure SQL, or Blob Storage best practices
example_queries: Azure App Service application settings .NET configuration

how_to_use.for_agents: Query Microsoft Learn when you need authoritative documentation on any Microsoft technology used in this project. Prefer this over web search for .NET / Azure topics — it returns structured, version-accurate content.
how_to_use.for_humans: No API key required. Node.js must be installed. The package is fetched automatically via npx on first use.
setup_instructions: First use downloads the package automatically
